steps.title: Set up the relationship from the figure
steps.content: The figure shows a right triangle. One acute angle is labeled $66°$, the other is therefore $90° - 66° = 24°$. The variable $x$ represents that second acute angle, so $x = 24$.

steps.title: Identify the answer
steps.content: So $x = 24$. That matches choice A — A is correct.
